title: Minty's Custom Recipes [Cobblemon]
description: Adds Recipes for uncraftable Cobblemon Items that're much needed!
body:
# Making Items made Easy!
In this data pack, you'll be able to create some uncraftable items in Cobblemon!

## Examples:

**Ability Capsule**
![Ability Capsule Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f8b4acdf9d6c5f404a146f8e2f34f66c560ddde7.png)

**Exp Candy XS**
![Exp Candy XS Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f0711cf7e193ca6ec4f180085928c063b8574b3c.png)

**Exp Candy S**
![Exp Candy S Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c97cc3f7db270ff4286fc3c7da611a60694d1809.png)

**Exp Candy M**
![Exp Candy M Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ee9a7cf50c95409306cb15792d1ea65cb16e0997.png)

**Exp Candy L**
![Exp Candy L Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3244c5e93110079b74e738d08c0adb001ae90a8f.png)

**Rare Candy Recipe**
![Rare Candy Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a8f7f912996999d1704ef9580f373b477c34aa0d.png)

## Do Note:
Not all the recipes are listed here! There are more Recipes for items such as the EV Feathers and Type Gems! Use the mod JEI for all the recipes!
